steps.t: The lonely tree where Núrelleth wants the vengeance arrow placed is on the bank of Anduin, east of Imlad Lalaith. Núrelleth wants the Elves of Lothlór…
Núrelleth is on Telain Glorelloth, on one of the flets that extends over the hedge that encircles Caras Galadhon. You have left the vengeance arrow at…
